title: Elouan Banana Smoothie
description: A refreshing blend of Elouan and banana, perfect for a quick breakfast or snack.

ingredients.name: 1 ripe banana
ingredients.notes: Choose a ripe banana for the best flavor

ingredients.name: 1 cup Elouan
ingredients.notes: You can adjust the amount to your taste

instructions: Add the banana and Elouan to a blender.
Blend the mixture on high speed until smooth.
Add ice cubes if you want a thicker consistency.
Blend again until the ice is crushed and the smoothie is the desired consistency.
Pour the smoothie into a glass and serve immediately.
